steps: "Submit formal tax reclaim to Skat.dk for DKK 153,600 excess withholding on NOVO B dividend under DK-NO treaty (15% vs. 25% applied)",
"Provide Danske Bank Custody with Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty claim documentation for account 2801234567",
"File online refund claim through Skat.dk system referencing ISIN DK0010244508 and 160,000 shares dividend payment",
"Follow up with Danske Bank to ensure proper treaty rate application for future NOVO B dividend payments"

references.title: Skat.dk – Claiming Refund of Danish Dividend Tax
Skat.dk – Online Claim Form for Dividend Tax Refund
